name: company-data-enricher
title: Company Data Enricher - Free B2B Lead & Domain Enrichment
description: Free Clearbit & ZoomInfo alternative. Enrich companies by domain: website metadata, social profiles (LinkedIn, Twitter, GitHub), tech stack detection (28+ technologies), email/phone contacts, RDAP/WHOIS domain registration. Search companies by name via Wikidata (founded, HQ, CEO, industry, employees). Bulk processing, JSON/CSV export. No API keys, zero monthly fees. Ideal for sales lead enrichment, competitive tech analysis, and market research. From $0.01/company.
